summary: Frontend-only retest of the four remaining final-release polish items: (1) Regular user ProfileDialog two-tab Account+Team flow, (2) CupBracket mobile (390px) no horizontal overflow, (3) CupBracket desktop (1440px) 2-column grid + winner/CANLI rendering, (4) Squad-save sonner toast with close button. ALL FOUR PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileDialog.jsx: When `username` is changed and save returns a new JWT, `localStorage.setItem('token', data.token)` is called but the axios api client interceptor must read it on next request — verified working via successive saves.

ProfileDialog DialogContent emits a React console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' (Radix a11y warning). Low priority — add a <DialogDescription> for screen-reader compliance.
CupBracket renders a single round (Çeyrek Final) so cup-round-tabs has only 1 button; multi-round overflow behaviour was not exercised in this run (only 3 quarterfinal matches seeded).

Squad-save success toast 'Kadro kaydedildi!' auto-dismisses within ~3.5s (matches index.js Toaster duration) and shows the sonner closeButton (data-close-button='true') which dismisses on click — fully verified.
test_credentials: Admin neco/neco404; regular users seed_Aslanlar/pass1234 (team 'Aslanlar') and seed_Kartallar/pass1234 — all confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: None this round. Re-used existing seed users + active cup 'Neon Kupası' with Çeyrek Final (YLD 3-1 ASL finished + 2 live).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four final-release polish items now verified end-to-end via Playwright: (1) ProfileDialog for a regular user (seed_Aslanlar) shows BOTH profile-tab-account and profile-tab-team; password change on Hesap tab shows 'Hesap bilgileri güncellendi'; team-tab edit (profile-team-name + profile-desc) saves with toast 'Takım & TD bilgileri güncellendi' and persists across dialog reopen (PUT /api/teams/me/info). (2) At 390px width on admin dashboard, document.documentElement.scrollWidth==clientWidth==390 (zero overflow); cup-match-* cards (3) render stacked with team names and scores visible; CANLI badges count=2 for live matches. (3) At 1440px the same 3 cards form a 2-column grid (sm:grid-cols-2 — first two cards on same row, leftDiff ~375px), finished match YLD 3 - 1 ASL row is highlighted in green with check, CANLI shown on live cards. (4) save-squad-btn for seed_Kartallar shows sonner toast with text 'Kadro kaydedildi!' and a [data-close-button='true'] X button — clicking it dismisses immediately, and the toast auto-dismisses within ~3.5s (Toaster duration in src/index.js). No JS console errors. Only a minor Radix a11y warning about missing DialogDescription on ProfileDialog.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — this iteration is a verification round, not a bug-fix round. All targeted polish items are confirmed working as specified in the review request.
